diagnostics.title: Component is not registered
diagnostics.summary: A named component cannot be resolved in the active application.
diagnostics.why: The component was not registered on this application instance.
diagnostics.remediation: Register it with app.component() before rendering.

diagnostics.title: Plugin is already installed
diagnostics.summary: An application received the same plugin more than once.
diagnostics.why: Plugin identity is application-scoped and duplicate installation would duplicate resources.
diagnostics.remediation: Install each plugin once or guard conditional setup.

diagnostics.title: Property validation failed
diagnostics.summary: A Custom Element property value did not satisfy its validator.
diagnostics.why: The declared validator returned false, a message, or threw.
diagnostics.remediation: Pass a value accepted by the public property declaration.

diagnostics.title: Required property is missing
diagnostics.summary: A required Custom Element property has no value.
diagnostics.why: The element connected or rendered before the required input was set.
diagnostics.remediation: Set the property before connection or make the declaration optional.

diagnostics.title: Event detail validation failed
diagnostics.summary: Emitted event detail did not satisfy the declared validator.
diagnostics.why: The event contract and emitted detail disagree.
diagnostics.remediation: Emit detail matching the public event declaration.

diagnostics.title: Event is not declared
diagnostics.summary: A Custom Element emitted an event absent from its public declarations.
diagnostics.why: Strict development diagnostics require public event metadata.
diagnostics.remediation: Add the event declaration or emit a declared event name.

diagnostics.title: Required slot is empty
diagnostics.summary: A required named or default slot has no assigned content.
diagnostics.why: The host omitted content required by the element contract.
diagnostics.remediation: Provide assigned content or make the slot optional.

diagnostics.title: Inline style element is unsupported
diagnostics.summary: Browser templates cannot contain style elements.
diagnostics.why: Gluon owns styles through constructable stylesheets and adoptedStyleSheets.
diagnostics.remediation: Move CSS into a css tagged template and adopt the resulting sheet.

diagnostics.title: ARIA attribute is unknown
diagnostics.summary: The template contains an unrecognized aria-* attribute.
diagnostics.why: The attribute is misspelled or is not part of the supported ARIA vocabulary.
diagnostics.remediation: Use the correct ARIA attribute or remove it.

diagnostics.title: Binding position is invalid
diagnostics.summary: A template binding appears in a tag or attribute name.
diagnostics.why: Dynamic values are supported only in child and attribute-value positions.
diagnostics.remediation: Move the binding into content or a complete attribute value.

diagnostics.title: Custom Element is unknown
diagnostics.summary: A hyphenated tag has no declaration or manifest entry.
diagnostics.why: The editor cannot find defineElement() metadata or a Custom Elements Manifest declaration.
diagnostics.remediation: Declare the element or supply its public manifest.

diagnostics.title: Custom Element event is unknown
diagnostics.summary: An @event binding is absent from the element declaration.
diagnostics.why: The event name and public element contract disagree.
diagnostics.remediation: Bind a declared event or update the declaration.

diagnostics.title: Custom Element property is unknown
diagnostics.summary: A .property binding is absent from the element declaration.
diagnostics.why: The property name and public element contract disagree.
diagnostics.remediation: Bind a declared property or update the declaration.

diagnostics.title: Void element has children
diagnostics.summary: A void HTML element contains children or a closing tag.
diagnostics.why: HTML void elements cannot own content.
diagnostics.remediation: Remove the children and closing tag.

diagnostics.title: Custom Element tag is invalid
diagnostics.summary: A functional element definition uses an invalid autonomous Custom Element name.
diagnostics.why: Platform Custom Element names must be lowercase, contain a hyphen, and cannot use the reserved xml prefix.
diagnostics.remediation: Use a valid lowercase autonomous Custom Element name such as shop-quantity.

diagnostics.title: Setup resource has no cleanup owner
diagnostics.summary: Functional element setup creates a listener or interval without a declared cleanup path.
diagnostics.why: Connection-owned resources must be released when the element disconnects or hot setup is replaced.
diagnostics.remediation: Register release work with context.onCleanup() or context.onDisconnected().

diagnostics.title: Lifecycle registration is deferred
diagnostics.summary: A functional element lifecycle callback is registered from nested or deferred work.
diagnostics.why: Lifecycle ownership is fixed synchronously during setup and cannot depend on later call order.
diagnostics.remediation: Move context.onConnected(), onUpdated(), onDisconnected(), or onErrorCaptured() registration into the synchronous setup body.

diagnostics.title: Custom Element slot is unknown
diagnostics.summary: A named light-DOM slot assignment is absent from the element declaration.
diagnostics.why: The slot attribute and public element contract disagree.
diagnostics.remediation: Use a declared slot name or update the literal slots declaration.

diagnostics.title: Hydration text mismatch
diagnostics.summary: Server and client text content differ.
diagnostics.why: The initial render inputs are not deterministic across server and browser.
diagnostics.remediation: Align request data and initial client state before hydration.

diagnostics.title: Hydration attribute mismatch
diagnostics.summary: Server and client attributes differ.
diagnostics.why: A bound attribute produced different initial values.
diagnostics.remediation: Use identical serialized inputs for the first client render.

diagnostics.title: Hydration structure mismatch
diagnostics.summary: Server and client node structure differs.
diagnostics.why: Conditional or list rendering produced a different template shape.
diagnostics.remediation: Make the initial template structure deterministic.

diagnostics.title: Hydration state mismatch
diagnostics.summary: Serialized server and client Store snapshots differ.
diagnostics.why: Client state changed before hydration or used another schema.
diagnostics.remediation: Restore the request snapshot before creating the client application.

diagnostics.title: Hydration style mismatch
diagnostics.summary: Server style carriers and client style manifest differ.
diagnostics.why: The server and browser did not use the same ordered stylesheet set.
diagnostics.remediation: Build both entries from the same public style modules.

diagnostics.title: SSR style transport is unsupported
diagnostics.summary: The browser cannot complete the required style handoff.
diagnostics.why: Constructable stylesheet or carrier requirements are not available.
diagnostics.remediation: Use a browser with the required capabilities and preserve server style carriers until hydration.

diagnostics.title: UI stylesheet hydration mismatch
diagnostics.summary: The scoped server UI sheets do not match the selected client theme and shared layers.
diagnostics.why: A required UI sheet is missing, duplicated, reordered, or has different content or a different digest.
diagnostics.remediation: Create server styles with createUiStyleSelection() and install the same theme with installUi(..., { hydrate: true }).

diagnostics.title: Component stylesheet hydration mismatch
diagnostics.summary: Request-derived server component sheets do not match the hydrated client value tree.
diagnostics.why: A component carrier is missing, extra, duplicated, reordered, content-mismatched, or emitted for another target.
diagnostics.remediation: Render and hydrate the same public component tree and preserve its ordered gluon-component carriers.

diagnostics.title: Legacy aggregate component styles conflict
diagnostics.summary: A deprecated category sheet and exact renderer-owned component sheet cover the same component.
diagnostics.why: The application retained an aggregate Atom, Molecule, or Organism sheet after migrating to usage-driven rendering.
diagnostics.remediation: Remove atomStyles, moleculeStyles, or organismStyles adoption; render components through their public functions.

diagnostics.title: SSR value is invalid
diagnostics.summary: The server renderer received a value it cannot serialize safely.
diagnostics.why: The value is not part of the supported template value contract.
diagnostics.remediation: Convert it to a supported primitive, template, iterable, or explicit trusted value.

diagnostics.title: SSR directive is unsupported
diagnostics.summary: A browser-only directive reached the server renderer.
diagnostics.why: The directive has no deterministic server contract.
diagnostics.remediation: Provide a server implementation or keep the directive in the browser path.

diagnostics.title: Universal client entry is missing
diagnostics.summary: The Vite universal build emitted no client entry chunk.
diagnostics.why: The build input does not define an application entry.
diagnostics.remediation: Configure a client entry before enabling the universal manifest.

diagnostics.title: Template checker input is missing
diagnostics.summary: gluon-template-check received no files or directories.
diagnostics.why: The command requires an explicit project input.
diagnostics.remediation: Pass one or more source files or directories.

diagnostics.title: Playground payload is invalid
diagnostics.summary: A shared Playground URL does not contain a valid two-file project.
diagnostics.why: The payload is malformed, truncated, or was not created by a compatible Playground version.
diagnostics.remediation: Open a new reproduction and share it again from the supported Playground.

diagnostics.title: Playground render export is missing
diagnostics.summary: The application module exports no supported render function.
diagnostics.why: The Playground requires a default, App, Counter, render, or other function export to produce a Gluon template.
diagnostics.remediation: Export the component or render function that the Playground should mount.

diagnostics.title: Playground compilation failed
diagnostics.summary: The edited TypeScript project could not be transpiled.
diagnostics.why: The application or stylesheet module contains invalid TypeScript syntax.
diagnostics.remediation: Correct the reported syntax error and run the reproduction again.

diagnostics.title: Playground import is unsupported
diagnostics.summary: A reproduction imports a package unavailable in the browser execution environment.
diagnostics.why: The online Playground intentionally exposes only its supported public Gluon runtime modules.
diagnostics.remediation: Use @gluonjs/core or @gluonjs/reactivity, or download the starter to add other dependencies locally.

diagnostics.title: Devtools application ID is empty
diagnostics.summary: A Devtools application registration has no stable ID.
diagnostics.why: Independent application snapshots require a non-empty identity.
diagnostics.remediation: Provide a stable application ID.

diagnostics.title: Devtools application ID is duplicated
diagnostics.summary: Two registered applications use the same ID.
diagnostics.why: Protocol snapshots cannot distinguish duplicate identities.
diagnostics.remediation: Use a unique ID or unregister the previous application.

diagnostics.title: Devtools application is unknown
diagnostics.summary: An operation targets an unregistered application.
diagnostics.why: The application was never registered or was already disposed.
diagnostics.remediation: Register it before recording or selecting it.

diagnostics.title: Devtools bridge is disabled
diagnostics.summary: A browser inspector mount was requested for an inert bridge.
diagnostics.why: Production-safe bridges are disabled by default.
diagnostics.remediation: Enable the bridge only in a development entry.
